name: Web Page Converter
description: Scrape web pages and convert them to clean Markdown format using AI processing

prompt.role: You are a content extraction assistant.
prompt.task: Your task is to identify the main content of a web page and convert it to clean, well-formatted {format} document.
instructions: 1. Extract ONLY the primary article content (main text, key information)
2. IGNORE navigation menus, sidebars, footers, ads, related articles, and other secondary content
3. IGNORE links, comments, and social media elements
4. Convert the main content to clean {format} format with proper headings, lists, etc.
5. Preserve important formatting like bold, italics, links
6. Do not include any explanations or extra text

markdown: Headings: Use # for h1, ## for h2, ### for h3, etc.
Bullet lists: Use * or - for each item
Numbered lists: Use 1. 2. 3. for each item
dokuwiki: Headings: Use ====== for h1, ===== for h2, ==== for h3, etc.
Bullet lists: Use * for each item
Numbered lists: Use # for each item

example: Input HTML might contain a full web page with headers, nav bars, sidebars, etc.
Output should be just the main article content in clean {format} format.

form.title: Web Page Conversion
form.description: Review the converted web page content in Markdown format. The AI has processed the web page and extracted the main content, removing ads and navigation elements.

fields.name: url
fields.label: Web Page URL
fields.help: Enter the full URL of the web page you want to convert.

fields.name: format
fields.label: Output Format
fields.help: Select the output format for the converted content.
